title: hieracium praecox subsp. ovalifolium
intro: Hieracium praecox subsp. ovalifolium is a subspecies of the hawkweed plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Hieracium praecox subsp. ovalifolium include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium praecox subsp. ovalifolium can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory issues.
